things.name: Yellow Crane Tower
things.description: China's most celebrated historic tower rebuilt on Snake Hill with panoramic Yangtze views

things.name: East Lake Scenic Area
things.description: China's largest urban lake with cherry blossom in March and the Moshan Scenic Area

things.name: Hubei Provincial Museum
things.description: Marquis Yi of Zeng's tomb treasures including 2,400-year-old bronze bells

things.name: Wuhan University Cherry Blossom
things.description: Hundreds of Japanese cherry trees on a hillside campus - among China's most beautiful

things.name: Guiyuan Buddhist Temple
things.description: Temple with 500 extraordinary 18th-century gilded Arhat figures

things.name: Yangtze River Crossing
things.description: Walk or cycle across China's great river on the 1957 Wuhan Yangtze River Bridge

things.name: Tianhe Wetland Park
things.description: Urban wetland with herons, waterfowl and rare Yangtze finless porpoises

things.name: Re Gan Mian (Hot Dry Noodles)
things.description: Wuhan's famous breakfast - noodles with sesame paste, spring onions and pickled mustard
